CREATE TABLE test_table (haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('абвгдеёжз', 'гдеёзд');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('hello world', 'world');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('新年快乐', '年');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('1234567890', '456');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('test ngramSearchUTF8', 'ngram');
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_table;
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) AS likelihood FROM test_table WHERE likelihood > 0.5;
SELECT haystack, ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) AS likelihood FROM test_table ORDER BY likelihood DESC;
WITH (SELECT haystack FROM test_table WHERE needle = 'гдеёзд') AS subquery SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(subquery, 'где') AS likelihood;
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, '不存在') FROM (SELECT '不存在的字符串' AS haystack) AS subquery;
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8('abcd', 'a') AND ngramSearchUTF8('abcd', 'b') AS result;
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_table WHERE haystack LIKE '%新%';
SELECT DISTINCT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, '不') FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO nested_test VALUES ('ngram search is useful');
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8((SELECT haystack FROM nested_test), 'use') AS likelihood;
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, 'xyz') FROM test_table WHERE haystack IN (SELECT haystack FROM test_table WHERE needle = 'world');
SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_table WHERE haystack IN (SELECT haystack FROM test_table WHERE needle LIKE '新%');
WITH (SELECT haystack FROM test_table WHERE needle = '测试') AS subquery SELECT ngramSearchUTF8(subquery.haystack, '测') AS likelihood;
